name: Gell Marsk the Blind Worm

sheet.name: Gell Marsk the Blind Worm
sheet.background_story:
An assassin that blindly followed the Wormlord. The dark mysterious aura on Gell Marsks armor had kept him alive in the forsaken lands, his devotion to darkness allowed him to survive in the Battle of the Burning Church.

Gell Marsk died shortly after the battle to noxious gas in the abyss, his curiosity the led him down the wrong path.
